title: Image Cropper
shortDescription: Crop images online with custom coordinates and instant browser-side preview.
metaTitle: Image Cropper Online | Crop Images in Browser
metaDescription: Crop images online with precise coordinates and instant preview. Fast, private, browser-based image cropper with no upload required.
intro: Crop images online with exact coordinates and see the result instantly in your browser. This free image cropper is fast, private, and easy to use.
overview: Use this online image cropper to trim photos, screenshots, banners, and graphics by setting custom crop values. Everything runs in your browser for quick editing and better privacy.
howItWorks: Upload or paste an image file into the tool.
Set the crop coordinates and dimensions.
Download the final image when it looks right.
useCases: Crop profile photos to a specific size.
Trim screenshots to focus on the important area.
Prepare product images for websites and marketplaces.
Remove empty borders from banners and graphics.

examples.title: Crop a photo for social media
examples.input: Set a square crop area around the subject.
examples.output: A centered square image ready for posting.
examples.description: Useful for avatars, posts, and thumbnails.

examples.title: Crop a screenshot
examples.input: Enter exact crop coordinates for the visible section.
examples.output: A clean screenshot with only the needed content.
examples.description: Great for tutorials, reports, and support docs.

faq.question: Is the image cropper free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, you can crop images online for free.

faq.question: Does the image leave my browser?
faq.answer: No, the crop happens client-side in your browser for better privacy.

faq.question: Can I crop with exact coordinates?
faq.answer: Yes, you can enter custom values for precise cropping.

faq.question: What image types are supported?
faq.answer: Common browser-supported image formats can be used.
